zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis I. De Bournonville於大約1055年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯布爾農維爾時，他的父親Gerard de Bournonville27歲，母親Elsberg Seclis27歲。他於1098年與Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1126年被列為rebâtir en 1126 le château de bournonville sur le anciennes ruines。他去世於1126年8月15日在法國帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis I. De Bournonville于大约1055年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯布爾農維爾时，他的父亲Gerard de Bournonville27岁，母亲Elsberg Seclis27岁。他于1098年与Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1126年被列为rebâtir en 1126 le château de bournonville sur le anciennes ruines。他去世于1126年8月15日在法国帕-德-卡拉斯布洛-素-梅享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Louis I. De Bournonville was born about 1055, in Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Gerard de Bournonville, was 27 and his mother, Elsberg Seclis, was 27. He married Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle in 1098. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. In 1126, at the age of 72, his occupation is listed as rebâtir en 1126 le château de bournonville sur le anciennes ruines. He died on 15 August 1126, in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis I. De Bournonville est né environ 1055, à Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Gerard de Bournonville, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elsberg Seclis, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle en 1098. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. En 1126, à l’âge de 72 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est rebâtir en 1126 le château de bournonville sur le anciennes ruines. Il est décédé le 15 août 1126, à Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.Orléans, Loiret, France: Orléans, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Louis I. De Bournonville um 1055 in Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerard de Bournonville 27 und seine Mutter Elsberg Seclis 27. Er hat 1098 Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1126, als er 72 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als rebâtir en 1126 le château de bournonville sur le anciennes ruines aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. August 1126 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis I. De Bournonville è nato il circa 1055 nel Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Gerard de Bournonville, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Elsberg Seclis, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle nel 1098. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1126, all'età di 72 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come rebâtir en 1126 le château de bournonville sur le anciennes ruines. Morì il 15 agosto 1126, nel Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis I. De Bournonvilleが約1055年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスボウルノンヴィルで生まれた時，父Gerard de Bournonvilleは27歳，母Elsberg Seclisは27歳であった。1098年にSylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1126年，72歳の時，職業はrebâtir en 1126 le château de bournonville sur le anciennes ruinesと記録されている。彼は1126年8月15日にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスボウログネ-スル-マーで72歳で死去した。

ko.Orléans, Loiret, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 올를e아스
ko.lifeSummary: Louis I. De Bournonville(이)가 대략 1055년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 부른빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerard de Bournonville(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Elsberg Seclis(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1098년 Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1126년, 72세의 나이로 그의 직업은 rebâtir en 1126 le château de bournonville sur le anciennes ruines이었다. 그는 1126년 8월 15일 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 부로그니-수-머에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis I. De Bournonville nasceu aproximadamente 1055, em Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Gerard de Bournonville, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elsberg Seclis, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle em 1098. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1126, com 72 anos, sua profissão aparece como rebâtir en 1126 le château de bournonville sur le anciennes ruines. Ele faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1126, em Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, França, com 72 anos.

ru.Orléans, Loiret, France: орлeанс, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis I. De Bournonville родился около 1055 г. в местности бурнонвилл, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Gerard de Bournonville было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elsberg Seclis, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle в 1098 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. В 1126 году, в возрасте 72 лет,  он работал по профессии rebâtir en 1126 le château de bournonville sur le anciennes ruines. Он умер 15 августа 1126 г. в местности боулогне-сур-мир, пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis I. De Bournonville nació aproximadamente 1055, en Bournonville, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Gerard de Bournonville, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elsberg Seclis, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sylvie de Normandie dame de Coquelle en 1098. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. En 1126, a la edad de 72 años, su ocupación registrada era rebâtir en 1126 le château de bournonville sur le anciennes ruines. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1126, en Boulogne-sur-Mer, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 72 años.
